# Bankruptcy Means Test by State: 2026 Income Limits and Eligibility
> Pass the bankruptcy means test? Use our free calculator to check Chapter 7 eligibility based on your income and expenses. Updated for 2026 fi...

## About
bankruptcymeanstest.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Chapter 7 Means Test Alabama: Income Limits and Calculator: https://bankruptcymeanstest.org/alabama.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
